description: jsonschema-module-swagger-2 is a victools jsonschema-generator extension that reads Swagger Core 2.x annotations when generating JSON Schema for Java types. It maps annotation metadata such as titles, descriptions, examples, nullability, required flags, and validation bounds into the generated schema.

jsonschema-module-swagger-2 is an extension for victools/jsonschema-generator that reads Swagger Core 2.x annotations while producing JSON Schema from Java types. It maps annotation metadata such as descriptions, titles, references, composition, required flags, nullability, defaults, access modes, formats, patterns, numeric bounds, and array constraints into generated schema attributes.
